{{Infobox location
| name = Aion
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Aion Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The Aion, also known as the [[Aion Sea]], is a vast and perilous ocean that serves as the heart of the world. It was created following the death-throes of [[Nakothi]], whose massive corpse is said to lie at its bottom. The sea is characterized by its extreme danger and supernatural phenomena, where the bizarre is more common than the natural. It is inhabited by a multitude of terrors, including ancient [[Elders]], various monsters and phantoms, hungry sharks, rogue [[Kameira]], and deadly creatures like the [[Aion Quail]]. The ocean is divided into different zones, such as the shallow Aion and the deep Aion; while the shallows are less dangerous, the deep waters contain unknowable hazards and true terrors. Navigating the Aion requires specialized expertise. [[Navigators]] use unique vessels, often constructed with parts of [[Elderspawn]] to help guide the ship through environmental hazards. Some sailors believe mastery of these waters involves a [[Soulbound]] connection between a captain and their vessel. The sea also contains moving landmasses, such as the floating [[island]] of Lhirin and other islands that may resemble the flesh or corpses of [[Great Elders]]. The Aion is a place where power, conflict, and blood attract unspeakable creatures, making it a site of both immense mystery and extreme lethality.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Aion is a vast body of water where [[Elders]] stir and can be summoned. [[Navigators]] typically cross this region using [[Elderspawn]] guides, though the [[Consultants]] once traveled through it quickly without such assistance. The waters are filled with hazards like wormclouds and nocturnal creatures that hunt by being lured to a glow on the surface. Within this space, things can sense an approaching [[Lyathatan]], and unspeakable creatures are drawn to blood, conflict, and power. [[Calder Marten]], who was exiled to the Aion, has sailed these waters for years, which contain an [[island]] at its center and sightings of the [[Children of Nakothi]] swimming nearby.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Navigator]] is hired to sail across the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a location where [[Elders]] stir.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a body of water.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] contains creatures that hunt by night and are lured to a glow on the surface of the water.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a location containing hazards like wormclouds.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a region or space crossed by [[Navigators]] using [[Elderspawn]] guides.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] contains things that can sense the [[Lyathatan]] approaching.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Consultants]] are traveling the [[Aion]] quickly without a [[Navigator]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Aion]] is a place where unspeakable creatures are lured by power, conflict, and blood.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has sailed the [[Aion]] for years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a location from which [[Elder]] creatures can be summoned.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[island]] is located in the middle of the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Aion]] is a body of water that [[Navigators]] cross.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder Marten]] was exiled to the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Children of Nakothi]] have been spotted swimming around the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Aion is a vast blue expanse situated at a depth beneath the debris field and is home to various floating islands. Rumors suggest that [[Nakothi]] waits at the very bottom of this expanse. Following reports from scouts regarding a [[Navigator]]'s ship, a [[Navigator]] eventually set out into the Aion. During these events, the [[Dead Mother]] could be heard screaming from somewhere out across the expanse.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Aion]] is a vast blue expanse.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Aion]] contains floating islands.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Aion]] is a depth located beneath the debris field.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] is rumored to wait at the bottom of the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Scouts in the [[Aion]] reported a [[Navigator]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Navigator]] set out into the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Dead Mother]] screamed from somewhere out on the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Aion is a traversable shallow sea characterized by the presence of the [[Navigator fleet]]'s many banners and sails. This location is fraught with various hazards, including the potential for travelers to encounter [[Elder]] influence while aboard their ships. Within these waters, sparks are born and [[Elder cultists]] may reside. Navigating such an environment requires admirable persistence, a quality that ultimately allows travelers to gain significant experience.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion]] contains many hazards.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion]] is a location where one might face [[Elder]] influence while on a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The sparks are born of the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c7">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion]] is a location where [[Elder cultists]] might exist.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Persistence is an admirable trait on the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion]] is a shallow sea covered by the [[Navigator fleet]]'s sails and banners.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Aion]] is a sea that can be traveled.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The characters are more experienced on the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Three boxes are going to float out to the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] risked himself on a distant [[island]] in the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Aion]] is a sea where sailors pass clouds.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Aion]] is a location that can be traveled.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aion]] is a location.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|One could flee [[Imperial justice]] into the [[Aion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Aion]] has shallow areas.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
